svg.text: Confusion matrix: where a 97.3%-accurate digit model makes its mistakes
Each of the 10,000 test images adds 1 to the cell [its true digit, the model's guess].
green = correct (the diagonal, where true digit = guess)
red = a mistake; darker = more of them
Boxed cell = the most common mistake: 15 real 4s were guessed as 9s (a 4 and a 9 look alike).
